arts.ttl: Full Arsenal squad available vs Dinamo Zagreb as duo return but five players ruled out
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, Ben White, William Saliba, Gabriel Jesus and Takehiro Tomiyasu all remain sidelined with injury. Arteta also confirmed that Ethan Nwaneri and Riccardo Calafiori will return to the matchday squad after their spells on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Man Utd HIJACK of Arsenal deal ‘one to watch’
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has suggested that Manchester United may attempt to hijack Arsenal ’s attempt to land Wolves attacker Matheus Cunha, describing him as “one to watch” in the January transfer window. Cunha has failed to sign a new contract with the Molineux club and has become a serious transfer target for Arsenal this January.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer could be blocked by Premier League rule in fresh Mikel Arteta blow
arts.sum: However, English top-flight clubs can only make two loan signings from Premier League clubs, a limit the Gunners have already reached with Raheem Sterling and Neto. To join our dedicated Arsenal channel, all you have to do is click this link and you can join thousands of others following our Gunners coverage!

arts.ttl: Teenager Arrested Over Social Media Abuse of Kai Havertz' Wife
arts.sum: A 17-year-old boy has been arrested in connection to online abuse sent to Kai Havertz and his wife, Sophia Weber.

arts.ttl: Arsenal initiate contact to sign Brazilian – Player would surely be thrilled with Gunners move
arts.sum: Over the past few days, we covered claims from Brazil which stated Flamengo want to sign Arsenal’s Jorginho in the winter market. At the weekend, O Dia reported the demands made by the 33-year-old’s agent is beyond the Brazilian club’s reach.
